MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: February 19, 2008

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Frank A. D'Alfonsi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff with plaintiff Maria A. Starbird.
Plaintiff was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Labib Barance.
Doe defendants dismissed today, February 19, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 101---Promissory Note dated 11/08/05----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 102---Deed of Trust dated 09/25/06------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 103---Domestic Wire Transfer Order dated 11/05/05---------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court grants judgment in favor of Plaintiff MARIA A. STARBIRD and against Defendant LABIB BARANCE.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than February 22, 2008.
